marketingText.welcomeMessage:
Step into the energy of Times Square from a hotel that puts you in the center of it all. Whether you're here for a Broadway show, city sightseeing, or Manhattan nightlife, our hotel in Times Square, NYC, is your perfect launchpad. Just steps from the neon glow, you’ll find Radio City Music Hall, Rockefeller Center, and the Theater District, plus skyline views from your Times Square hotel room.

Our location makes exploring easy. Central Park, Madison Square Garden, Fifth Avenue shopping, and Hudson Yards are all within walking distance. Grab last-minute show tickets at the TKTS Booth or wander the High Line. Wherever your plans take you, Midtown Manhattan is at your feet.

Inside, our hotel in Times Square, New York, balances the buzz of the city with the ease of a boutique stay. Enjoy skyline cocktails at our rooftop bar, classic comfort food at our restaurant, or quick snack options. We're here to make every stay feel personal and distinctly NYC.

Smoking Policy/Fee
Kimpton Hotel Theta is committed to providing its guests and associates with a smoke-free environment. Smoking tobacco, pipes, vapes, e-cigarettes, and marijuana are strictly prohibited within the hotel. By booking through this website, you acknowledge that the hotel has installed smoking detection sensors provided by Rest Sensor in its rooms. Rest Sensor is a smart device that allows hotel management to respond to smoking events without disrupting your stay. You hereby agree and consent to the use of the Rest sensor in your room and acknowledge that you will be assessed a fee of $500 for each smoking violation. Tampering with the sensor is strictly prohibited.

Enjoy plush bedding, an ergonomic workspace, and all the essentials for a comfortable stay in your spacious room.

marketingText.welcomeMessage:

marketingText.welcomeMessage:
Hotel's Location in East Brunswick, NJ

Conveniently situated off the NJ Turnpike (I-95) and close to downtown New Brunswick, NJ, we're near many of the top businesses and attractions. The hotel's prime locale and hospitality make the Holiday Inn Express® Hotel Tower Center New Brunswick a wonderful place to stay.

Enjoyable attractions are easy to find in East Brunswick, NJ. The hotel's location near the New Jersey Convention and Exposition Center means guests can easily attend special events. Six Flags Great Adventure and Princeton University make great day trips, too.

You can feel your stress melt away as you unwind in the heated, salt-water indoor pool or keep up your workout regimen in the Fitness Center. Each morning, guests can also partake in variety of delicious items from the free, hot Express Start Breakfast Bar. Call today for a lovely, stress-free Garden State Experience.
